channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 darrylmorley/whatcable (4810 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: darrylmorley

📝 Repository: darrylmorley/whatcable

📄 Descrizione: macOS menu bar app that tells you, in plain English, what each USB-C cable plugged into your Mac can actually do

⭐ Stelle: 4810

🍴 Forks: 151

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: apple-silicon hardware-info iokit mac-app macos menubar menubar-app swift swiftui thunderbolt usb-c usb-power-delivery utility

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-01T07:45:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-30T05:20:35Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 tddworks/baguette (1029 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tddworks

📝 Repository: tddworks/baguette

item.description:
👤 Owner: awizemann

📝 Repository: awizemann/harness

🍴 Forks: 13

💻 Linguaggio: Swift
